channel.title: Titrin Agrisoil Solutions - Resources
channel.description: Practical guides on ALC applications, soil assessments, farm plans, and agricultural land use in British Columbia.

item.title: How to Apply to the Agricultural Land Commission in BC
item.description: Step-by-step guide to the ALC application process — fees, timelines, required documents, and what to expect at each stage.

item.title: Soil Deposit and Fill Rules on ALR Land in BC
item.description: What you can and can't do with soil and fill on agricultural land — thresholds, prohibited materials, and when you need an application.

item.title: Getting Farm Classification in BC: Requirements and Process
item.description: Income thresholds, application deadlines, farm plan requirements, and how to qualify for farm tax status through BC Assessment.

item.title: What You Can and Can't Do on ALR Land in BC
item.description: A plain-language breakdown of permitted uses in BC's Agricultural Land Reserve — what's allowed by right, what needs an application.
